name: arcade-collapse
description: Fast cabinet-noise montage with crunchy tone shards, bad clocks, and over-bright failures.

sections.name: attract
sections.intent: Bright pops and short digital calls establish a broken game loop.

sections.name: coin-jam
sections.intent: The event rate feels overfed, like the machine is swallowing inputs.

sections.name: overheat
sections.intent: Buzz and glitch colors smear into a final cabinet collapse.

example_command: cargo run -- piece --output out/arcade-collapse.wav --scene arcade-collapse --random-preset feral --seed 43003
